description:
in which he’s been coming to the diner you work at for the last 2 months trying to woo you.˚ʚ♡ɞ˚

#diner

────୨ৎ────

⤷ ゛❝mateo hauled you onto his lap like he’d been waiting months to get his hands on you—because he had. his mouth crashed against yours, messy, starving, all tongue and teeth like he’d finally stopped pretending he could take it slow.

you ground down once and he hissed against your throat, “fuck…” barely a breath, almost a prayer. his hands locked on your hips, dragging you harder against him, the thick press of him hitting right where you were already aching.

“you don’t even know what you do to me.” you grind again—slow, deliberate—and his breath stuttered. “been thinkin’ ’bout this for months,” he muttered against your neck, hips lifting to meet yours. “been losin’ my damn mind wantin’ you.”❞ˎˊ˗
